title: low visibility of hero options
environment:
Game version: 1.0
Platform: web
Device: thinkpad t470s
Internet connection: wireless
steps:
open web app
find hero options on the bottom of the page
open dropdown menu
expected: options are easy to read for an user
actual: options are not easily visible due to low contrast of text and background
notes: after first open of the hamburger options aren't visible at all for few seconds

title: spinning icons are outside of frame
environment:
Game version: 1.0
Platform: web
Device: thinkpad t470s
Internet connection: wireless
steps:
open web app
press the button spin to see spin animation
actual: icons are moved slightly below the top line of the frame causing them to being pushed below bottom frame line
notes: the bug appears to not happen in every session

title: icons have wrongly implemented png background
environment:

Platform: web
Device: thinkpad t470s

steps:

look at the casino icons
expected: icons should be with the see-trough backgroun for better presentation
actual: icons have checkered background commonly used for png images
